hero.title: WELLNESS JOURNEY
hero.subtitle: Ancient healing rituals meet modern science. A sanctuary carved from limestone and wrapped in silence.

intro.title: Where Stone Heals
intro.description: Carved directly into the limestone bedrock, our spa is a sanctuary where ancient materials and modern techniques converge. Here, silence is not empty—it is full of healing.
intro.quote: The body knows how to heal. We simply create the conditions.

treatments.name: Limestone Hot Stone Massage
treatments.description: Heated limestone basalt stones placed along meridians. Deep tissue release with warm stone therapy.

treatments.name: Cryogenic Chamber
treatments.description: -110°C. Three minutes. Complete cellular renewal. Used by elite athletes.

treatments.name: Sound Bath & Meditation
treatments.description: Crystal singing bowls and silent meditation in our limestone sound chamber.

treatments.name: Limestone Micro-Polish Facial
treatments.description: Crushed limestone exfoliation with nutrient-rich serums.

treatments.name: Floatation Therapy
treatments.description: Zero-gravity float in mineral-rich water. Complete sensory deprivation.

treatments.name: Ayurvedic Abhyanga
treatments.description: Warm oil massage with two therapists in synchronized motion.

facilities.name: Limestone Steam Room
facilities.description: Aromatic steam infused with eucalyptus, rising from heated limestone.

facilities.name: Cryo Chamber
facilities.description: -110°C cold therapy for recovery and rejuvenation.

facilities.name: Meditation Grotto
facilities.description: Carved from limestone, designed for complete silence.

philosophy.title: The Lithos Way
philosophy.description: 3,000 hours of training before touching a guest. Each treatment customized to your body's needs that day.
principles: Ancient Materials: Limestone, basalt, and natural fibers
Modern Science: Cryotherapy and cellular analysis
Complete Silence: Soundproofed rooms with 65 STC rating
Personalized Care: One guest, one therapist
